TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Mornos ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Nakahama go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 94 buwan, 240 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 92% kyan ku 221 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 8% kyan ku 19 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 87%, Puyuma 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 4%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Mornos hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Mornos hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Mornos hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Mornos hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Mornos hya' ga Ciwkangan. tay mkyahu' na Mornos hya' ga Pakara'ac. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Mornos ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ mornos~ɕ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu nakaħama ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, pujuma *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na mornos~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na mornos~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na mornos~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na mornos~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na mornos~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨiwkaŋan. taj mkjaħuʔ na mornos~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa pakaraʔaʦ~ʨ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ mornos~ɕ ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Mornos ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Nakahama go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 94 buwan, 240 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 92% kyan ku 221 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 8% kyan ku 19 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 87%, Puyuma 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 4%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Mornos hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Mornos hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Mornos hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Mornos hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Mornos hya' ga Ciwkangan. tay mkyahu' na Mornos hya' ga Pakara'ac. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Mornos ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ mornos~ɕ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu nakaħama ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, pujuma *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na mornos~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na mornos~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na mornos~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na mornos~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na mornos~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨiwkaŋan. taj mkjaħuʔ na mornos~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa pakaraʔaʦ~ʨ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ mornos~ɕ ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
